### The Abandoned 'Ghost Mansion' of Northern Italy [...] ## The definitive map of the world’s extraordinary sights.

Atlas Obscura catalogues the most unusual, surprising, and amazing places around the world, thanks to the discoveries shared by our intrepid community of travelers and explorers. There are now more than 31,700 incredible hidden wonders listed in the Atlas, and we’ve plotted each and every one of them on this interactive map.

The possibilities are vast, from a pizzeria on a volcano to a rainbow-hued salt lake, to an observatory modeled after R2D2, to the last wild apple forests and thousands of other architectural oddities, natural wonders, catacombs and crypts, and unique collections across the world’s continents and oceans. results.title: Dust 2: Frustrating, Broken and Iconic ⇒ Pley.gg
results.content:
Despite the pro-players wishes to remove the map from the professional map-pool, statistics show that the map was played the most over the past 12 months at big events between the top 20 teams. It was played a total of 16 times with Nuke and Inferno settling at second place, having been played 11 times. This shows just how frustrating it must be for some teams to play on Dust 2, but also how immortal and an integrated part of the Counter-Strike scene, the map has grown to become.

Watch and learn more about Dust 2’s history as well as its best and worst moments here:

Dust 2: Frustrating, Broken and Iconic
Dust 2: Frustrating, Broken and Iconic

### Pley Admin [...] Whilst de\_dust was a fan favorite from the beginning it wasn’t a map suitable for competitive play and a task for creating a new more competitive version of Dust was set out. This lead to Dust 2 in its first form. After the release of Counter-Strike Global Offensive in 2012 Dust 2 was remodeled and was made even more popular within the Counter-Strike community. The map brought some of the most well-known highlights in professional Counter-Strike, among the infamous “Inhuman reactions” clip sparked by, at the time, Cloud9 player “Hiko”. [...] # Dust 2: Frustrating, Broken and Iconic

## Most read CS2 news

Dust 2: Frustrating, Broken and Iconic
Dust 2: Frustrating, Broken and Iconic
Season 5 Premier CS2
Season 5 Premier CS2
Dust 2: Frustrating, Broken and Iconic
Dust 2: Frustrating, Broken and Iconic
Dust 2: Frustrating, Broken and Iconic
Dust 2: Frustrating, Broken and Iconic

The first version of Dust was released in Counter-Strike on the 5th. November 1999 and was called de\_dust. The first version of the map was not made by a map developer or even a Valve employee, but instead, a 16-year-old boy who stumbled upon the tools to make what was soon to become the beginning of Counter-Strikes, arguably, most iconic map ever.

results.title: How do I report a blocked road due to construction or other adversities?
results.content:
Oct 3, 2019

10/3/2019, 8:48:29 PM

Get link

Report abuse

wasted so much gas cuz maps wanna be stubborn and reroute on a blocked road. Waze definitely onto something.

Bekkajo

Oct 9, 2019

10/9/2019, 11:48:50 AM

Get link

Report abuse

Agreed. Something quick in real time would be great. My usual route into town has a blocked road. The detour added 25 minutes onto my trip. It would have be nice to find other options on maps. Do I follow the detour or turn around and take a whole new route? My rural situation and unfamiliarity with the area could have be helped with a quick rerouting option.

JC Rodriguez 8579

Oct 22, 2019

10/22/2019, 5:03:12 PM

Get link

Report abuse [...] Nov 2, 2019

11/2/2019, 6:16:32 AM

Get link

Report abuse

Google Map new real-time road status report function _need to be used when you start navigation_. And you can see a new "+" label under the "speaker" and "search" labels on your map right hand side. Click "+" and you'll see several "incidents' to report or share. Such as "traffic accident" "camera warning" "traffic jam" "construction" "road closure" "roadside breakdown" or "hazard on road".. Need to keep your google map latest.. One of my android update map to 10.27.2 able to use this new feature yet another android and iphone map already update 10.28.. cannot use it which I still work on it..

Becca Petrin

Nov 9, 2019

11/9/2019, 3:47:59 AM

Get link

emmasroadmap

Some BTS of the @roadmapp.app launch last week. I still can’t believe the app is finally live for everyone. It feels like I spent an entire year working towards this moment and now… I can finally go on holiday 😂  
  
Joking of course, seeing thousands of people use the app only inspires me even more to make it the best travel app possible. It’s just the beginning of what RoadmApp will be. So if you have any honest feedback or suggestions, please let me know in the comments! 👇  
  
And most of all, thank you so much for downloading! ❤️
